contract_scope: Shape of a text chunk produced by the fixed-size chunking strategy (#R-6). Consumed by chunk persistence (#R-7), vector store (#R-8), and retrieval pipeline (#R-10). The envelope is pinned here so all consumers share one authoritative shape.
honesty_rules: chunk_id is deterministic: chk-{doc_prefix_8hex}-{sequence_4digit}. Idempotent re-chunking of the same document with the same parameters produces the same chunk_ids.
byte_offset and byte_length are byte-level positions in the original document's UTF-8 encoding. char_length is the mb_strlen equivalent for client display.
Only fixed_size strategy is implemented. Sentence-boundary, paragraph-boundary, and semantic chunking are fenced for a future leaf.
overlap is in bytes, not characters or tokens. A future leaf may add token-aware overlap.
